text.zh: Faster R-CNN 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Faster R-CNN is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: 早期 R-CNN 系统依赖外部候选区域算法，在特征提取与检测之间形成瓶颈。Faster R-CNN 引入区域建议网络，与检测器共享卷积特征。这个统一的两阶段流水线成为高精度目标检测的标准参照。
text.en: Earlier R-CNN systems depended on external region proposal algorithms, creating a bottleneck between feature extraction and detection. Faster R-CNN introduced a Region Proposal Network that shares convolutional features with the detector. This unified two-stage pipeline became a standard reference point for accurate object detection.
